stub: He is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background.
constituency: He is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: He rarely speaks out and votes against his party leadership.
substantive: He opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, he regularly uses arguments that appeal to society as a whole.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
text: He is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background. He is from a constituency that is not your constituency. He rarely speaks out and votes against his party leadership. He opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, he regularly uses arguments that appeal to society as a whole. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
